codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff/progress entry, the worker transcript skeleton, and commit `3c0b7551357ee12a487e58f52ac0eb8f107604e7`, then independently re-ran `flutter test test/features/threads/thread_detail_page_test.dart --plain-name "real-thread grouped exploration preserves read labels and bridge search label/count"` and inspected the new real bridge fixture to confirm it contains four `exploration_kind: search` annotations labeled `Search`. The implementation is coherent with the feature goal: the new captured timeline page provides real bridge search-annotation evidence, the added widget test proves grouped exploration preserves both read-file labels and `Search (4)`, and the production changes correctly retain per-label search counts in `thread_timeline_block.dart` and render them in `thread_detail_page_timeline.dart`. I did not identify blocking or non-blocking issues within this feature's scope.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff/progress context, transcript skeleton, existing scrutiny-review style, and commit `3c0b7551357ee12a487e58f52ac0eb8f107604e7`, then re-ran the targeted Flutter widget test and verified the captured fixture's real search-annotation counts. The change set satisfies VAL-FLUTTER-005: grouped exploration now preserves read labels and the bridge-provided search label/count from a real target-thread payload. No blocking or non-blocking code issues identified, so this scrutiny review passes.
